schools.name: Adelaide University
schools.foodCulture: Adelaide offers diverse culinary scene with fresh local produce, famous wine regions nearby, and multicultural dining options from Central Market
schools.climate: Mediterranean climate with hot dry summers (25-35°C) and mild wet winters (8-18°C), perfect for outdoor activities
specialFeatures: Top-ranked research university in Australia (QS top 100)
Located in wine capital of Australia
Strong programs in health sciences and engineering
Beautiful campus with modern research facilities
Close to Adelaide Hills and beaches
uniqueFeaturesZh: 澳洲頂尖研究型大學（QS前100）
健康科學和工程課程強勁
美麗校園配現代研究設施
靠近阿德萊德山和海灘
schools.foodCultureZh: 阿德萊德提供多元美食場景，新鮮本地產品，附近著名葡萄酒產區，以及來自中央市場的多文化餐飲選擇
schools.climateZh: 地中海氣候，夏季炎熱乾燥（25-35°C），冬季溫和濕潤（8-18°C），適合戶外活動
